task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened and read the manifest_list.txt file to identify the 5 chemical products.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor, terminal window (using cat/less), or file viewer displaying the contents of ~/Desktop/manifest_list.txt.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent accessed the CAMEO Chemicals website.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser open to https://cameochemicals.noaa.gov/ with the site's search interface visible.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent searched for the specific chemicals and viewed their datasheets, paying attention to the 'Chemical Identifiers' section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the agent viewing the CAMEO Chemicals datasheet for at least one of the specific chemicals (e.g., Ammonia Anhydrous, Hydrogen Peroxide 50%), specifically looking at the 'Chemical Identifiers' section where UN numbers and hazard labels are listed.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent created the shipping_audit.csv file with the exact required headers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A spreadsheet application or text editor showing a new file named shipping_audit.csv (saved to ~/Desktop) with the first row containing exactly: Product,UN_Number,Hazard_Labels.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent populated the CSV with the correct UN Numbers and Hazard Labels for the 5 chemicals, distinguishing between concentrations.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The shipping_audit.csv file showing the correct UN numbers and labels corresponding to the specific concentrations (e.g., UN 2014 with labels 5.1 and 8 for H2O2 50%, but UN 2984 with only label 5.1 for H2O2 15%).

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually navigated the CAMEO Chemicals website rather than hallucinating the data from its internal knowledge base.
integrity.visual_evidence: Browser history, active tabs, or sequential screenshots showing genuine search queries and datasheet navigation on cameochemicals.noaa.gov.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent created and saved the CSV file in the specified Desktop directory rather than just printing the output to a terminal.
integrity.visual_evidence: A file manager showing shipping_audit.csv on the Desktop, or a text editor/spreadsheet application actively saving to the ~/Desktop/ path.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not use a script with hardcoded answers or echo the final text directly into the file without performing the web search.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal commands like `echo "Product,UN_Number..." > shipping_audit.csv` containing the final answers without prior web browsing activity.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified data for the 5 chemicals: 1. Ammonia Anhydrous: UN 1005, Hazard Labels: 2.2 (Non-Flammable Gas). 2. Ammonia 25% Solution: UN 2672, Hazard Labels: 8 (Corrosive). 3. Hydrogen Peroxide 50%: UN 2014, Hazard Labels: 5.1 (Oxidizer), 8 (Corrosive). 4. Hydrogen Peroxide 15%: UN 2984, Hazard Labels: 5.1 (Oxidizer) [Critically lacks Class 8]. 5. Nitric Acid Red Fuming: UN 2032, Hazard Labels: 8 (Corrosive), 5.1 (Oxidizer), 6.1 (Poison Inhalation Hazard).
